title: ComplianceCode
description: Recognized compliance frameworks and identity standards for credential format abstraction

ICAO_DTC.standard: ICAO Doc 9303, ICAO DTC Technical Report

EUDI_PID.description: EU Digital Identity Wallet — Person Identification Data

EUDI_MDL.description: EU Digital Identity Wallet — Mobile Driving Licence

OB3_JWT.standard: 1EdTech Open Badges 3.0, W3C VC Data Model

OB3_JSONLD.description: 1EdTech Open Badge v3.0 (JSON-LD Linked Data Proof)
OB3_JSONLD.standard: 1EdTech Open Badges 3.0, W3C VC Data Model, JSON-LD 1.1

SD_JWT_VC.description: Generic Selective Disclosure JWT Verifiable Credential (no framework binding)

ENTERPRISE_VC.description: Generic enterprise verifiable credential (JWT or SD-JWT-VC)
ENTERPRISE_VC.use_case: Organization-internal credentials not bound to a public standard

ICAO_MRZ.description: ICAO Machine Readable Travel Document — MRZ extraction and verification
ICAO_MRZ.standard: ICAO Doc 9303 Parts 1–13 — Machine Readable Travel Documents

OID4VC.description: Generic OpenID for Verifiable Credentials interoperability profile (OID4VCI + OID4VP)
OID4VC.standard: OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance 1.0 Final; OpenID for Verifiable Presentations 1.0 Final

PEX.description: DIF Presentation Exchange v2 — presentation request and submission protocol
